reasoning: Query is Tohoku sakura but tool was scoped to Akita only. Returned spots (Ōyu Stone Circles, Dakigaeri Ravine, Akita Museum, Hachirōgata, Lake Tazawa) are well-structured Wikidata records but not sakura-flagged. 角館 (canonical Akita sakura site) absent in visible truncation; cross-prefecture Tohoku entities (弘前公園, 三春滝桜, 北上展勝地) entirely missing because the call did not span Tohoku.
missing_entities: 角館, 弘前公園, Hirosaki, 三春滝桜, 北上展勝地
improvement_hint: Detect 桜/sakura intent and apply kinds=sakura_meisho_100 filter; expose region-level get_spots that auto-fans across Tohoku prefectures (Aomori/Iwate/Akita/Miyagi/Yamagata/Fukushima).

reasoning: Query asks for Niigata sake breweries; get_local_specialty returned MAFF GI food items (kurosaki chamame, snow-buried carrots, lotus root). Schema is solid (key, source_url, translation_meta) but content is wrong-domain. No 八海山, 久保田, 越乃寒梅 or any sake brewery / 酒蔵 entity surfaces.
missing_entities: 八海山, 久保田, 越乃寒梅, Hakkaisan, sake brewery, 酒蔵
improvement_hint: Add a sake_brewery dataset (NTA 国税庁 list / GI:Q26226 sake) and route 酒蔵/sake intent there; deprioritize MAFF food GIs when the query token is sake.

reasoning: Hakuba ski + onsen query; municipality filter returned only 5 spots and the top is a generic UN Tourism news article (low value). 白馬大池, Hakuba Saegusa Art Museum, Goryū Alpine Garden present but 白馬八方尾根 / Happo-One absent; no ski_resort or onsen kinds emitted. Schema fields and Wikidata QIDs are clean.
missing_entities: 白馬八方尾根, Happo-One, ski_resort, onsen
improvement_hint: Enrich with OSM aerialway=* / leisure=resort + amenity=spa for ski_resort and onsen kinds; demote single-page news articles in must_see ranking.

reasoning: Kansai autumn-foliage query restricted to Kyoto. Top entries (二条城, 東寺, 西本願寺, 仁和寺) are bona-fide Kyoto landmarks with full heritage_designations and multilingual labels, but the canonical momiji spots 東福寺 / 永観堂 / 嵐山 are not in the visible window. Excellent schema/traceability though.
missing_entities: 東福寺, 永観堂, 嵐山, Tofukuji, Eikando
improvement_hint: Add a momiji_meisho kinds (or autumn_foliage tag) sourced from 紅葉の名所 lists; apply kinds=momiji boost when 紅葉/autumn foliage intent detected.

reasoning: Kansai sakura, Nara scope. 吉野山 ranked #1 with sakura_meisho_100 kind plus heritage labels, prominence 1.0. 高松塚古墳, 興福寺, 元興寺 follow as legitimate Nara entities. 醍醐寺 and 哲学の道 (Kyoto-domain) absent due to Nara filter, but the headline expected entity 吉野山 is perfectly recalled and ranked.
missing_entities: 醍醐寺, 嵐山, 哲学の道
improvement_hint: For Kansai sakura intent fan-out across Nara+Kyoto+Osaka+Hyogo+Wakayama; add kinds=sakura_meisho_100 promotion across the region call.

reasoning: Okinawa stargazing query but tool returned cultural-heritage spots (玉陵, 首里城, 中城城, 斎場御嶽). No 石垣島 / 西表島 / 波照間 / 国際ダークスカイ協会 spots, no 'remote island' / 離島 / dark_sky kind. Records are accurate and well-attributed but mismatched to intent.
missing_entities: 波照間島, 石垣島, 西表島, dark_sky_park, 離島
improvement_hint: Add dark_sky_park kind (Iriomote-Ishigaki National Park is an IDA-certified Dark Sky Place) and surface 離島/remote-island entities when 星空/星 intent detected.

reasoning: Hokkaido rural onsen ryokan query. Top results from 日本秘湯を守る会 (知内温泉旅館, 銀婚湯, 凌雲閣, 湧駒荘) are perfectly on-intent: rural, secluded, designated. Schema has authority, designation_jp/en, source_url. Coordinates are null which limits map utility, and an unrelated ANA Holiday Inn appears further down (urban, not rural).
improvement_hint: Add coordinates to hito_yu_kai records via geocoding; rank 日本秘湯を守る会 above generic urban hotels when 田舎/remote/ryokan intent is detected.

reasoning: Seto Inland Sea islands query but Kagawa-only filter returned mainland landmarks (栗林公園, 満濃池, 丸亀城, 高松城). 直島 / 小豆島 / 豊島 — the canonical Seto art-islands — not visible; 小豆島 should have appeared with prefecture=Kagawa. Schema is excellent.
missing_entities: 直島, 小豆島, 豊島, Naoshima, Shodoshima, Teshima
improvement_hint: Add island kind (Q23442) filter; for 'Seto Inland Sea islands' intent fan-out across Kagawa+Okayama+Hiroshima+Ehime+Yamaguchi and boost P31:island.

reasoning: Tokushima indigo (藍染) workshop query. METI returned 阿波正藍しじら織 (relevant indigo weave) plus 大谷焼 (ceramics, off-topic) and 阿波和紙 (mentions plant-dyed indigo paper). 藍住町 藍の館 / Aizumi Indigo Museum and 阿波藍 dye workshops absent. see_also_wikidata_venues offers 大塚国際美術館 — not indigo-related.
missing_entities: 藍の館, 阿波藍, indigo dye workshop, 藍住町
improvement_hint: Surface 阿波藍 dye museums/workshops via Wikidata P136=indigo_dye or municipal facility lists; add indigo_workshop kind.

reasoning: Koyasan shukubo query — perfect intent match. Returns 安養院, 一乗院, 惠光院, 北室院, 熊谷寺 etc., all confirmed 高野山宿坊協会 members with detailed Japanese descriptions, phone numbers, and source URLs. Authority and designation cleanly attributed. Coordinates null is the only weak spot.
improvement_hint: Geocode shukubo entries (postal/street → lat/lng); add name_en transliteration for international agents.

reasoning: Off-the-beaten-path samurai districts query. search_area returned 134 matches incl. 武家屋敷 (Shimane), 旧内山家 (Fukui), 知覧武家屋敷 (Kagoshima with Important Preservation District designation), 会津武家屋敷 (Fukushima), and 鞆の浦 (Hiroshima preservation district) — geographically diverse, on-intent, well-attributed.
improvement_hint: Add description_en values where null (e.g. Q11545900); already strong otherwise.

reasoning: Akita summer-festival query (Indonesian). Three Akita Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property festivals returned (大日堂舞楽, 角館のお祭り, 土崎神明社祭) plus UNESCO-listed Hayachine Kagura/Ainu cross-prefecture entries. 竿燈まつり (canonical Akita summer festival) and 西馬音内盆踊 / 花輪ばやし are absent in visible window. Indonesian translations present.
missing_entities: 竿燈まつり, Kanto Festival, 西馬音内盆踊, 花輪ばやし
improvement_hint: Ingest 東北六魂祭/竿燈 from JNTO or 文化庁 国指定文化財 list; the bunka_intangible feed is missing 重要無形民俗文化財 outside Wikidata mirror.

reasoning: Sanin small-port-town query but Shimane-only filter returned castles and silver mine (石見銀山, 松江城, 月山富田城, 浜田城). 美保関 / 温泉津 / 鷺浦 (canonical Shimane fishing villages) absent in visible window. 石見銀山 has preservation_district designation which is partially relevant.
missing_entities: 美保関, 温泉津, 鷺浦, fishing village, 漁港
improvement_hint: Add port/fishing-village kind via OSM landuse=port + JF Zengyoren list; surface 重要伝統的建造物群保存地区 of fishing-port type.

reasoning: Gifu washi-experience query. METI list returned 美濃焼 (ceramic), 飛騨春慶 (lacquer), 南木曽ろくろ細工 (woodwork), 一位一刀彫 (woodcarving). 美濃和紙 (canonical Gifu washi) NOT visible in this truncation despite count=8 — could be in remaining 4 items. Tool itself returns crafts but not a workshop venue layer.

improvement_hint: Surface 美濃和紙 explicitly first when query token is washi; add a craft-workshop venue layer mapping META kougeihin to 体験施設.

reasoning: Noto fishing-village query but get_spots returned Kanazawa-centric headliners (金沢城, 兼六園, 国立工芸館, 七尾城). 輪島 / 舳倉島 / 黒島地区 / 間垣の里 (canonical Noto fishing villages) absent. Records themselves are accurate Wikidata.
missing_entities: 輪島, 舳倉島, 黒島地区, 間垣の里, Wajima
improvement_hint: Add municipality boost when query implies sub-region (能登半島 = 七尾市/輪島市/珠洲市/穴水町/能登町); add 重要伝統的建造物群保存地区 surface for 黒島地区.

reasoning: Sand dunes nationwide query. search_area returned 81 matches incl. 鳥取砂丘 (relevant), 鳥取砂丘らっきょう (off-topic GI), 浜岡砂丘 (Shizuoka, on-intent), 白砂公園. Top results are heavy on Tottori municipal-scrape pages — some redundant. Lesser-known 中田島砂丘 / 内灘砂丘 absent in visible window.
missing_entities: 中田島砂丘, 内灘砂丘, 鳴り砂海岸
improvement_hint: Filter out non-spot designations (MAFF GI らっきょう) for 砂丘 keyword; promote OSM natural=dune + Wikidata Q23086.

reasoning: Sanin (Shimane) traditional crafts in Chinese. Returns 石見焼 (Iwami ware), 石州和紙 (Sekishu washi UNESCO), 雲州そろばん (Unshu abacus), 出雲石燈ろう (Izumo stone lantern) — all canonical Shimane traditional crafts with proper Chinese translations. Excellent coverage; 山陰 includes Tottori too which is not covered, but that's a query-scoping issue.
missing_entities: 鳥取の工芸 (e.g. 因州和紙)
improvement_hint: For 山陰 region intent, fan-out to Shimane+Tottori prefecture codes and merge results.

reasoning: Hokkaido lavender beyond Furano query. Returns generic Hokkaido landmarks (松前城, 五稜郭, 昭和新山, 札幌市時計台). 中富良野ファーム富田 / Tomita Farm — the iconic lavender farm — not present, nor 上野ファーム or other lavender venues. No lavender_field kind exists.
missing_entities: ファーム富田, Tomita Farm, 上野ファーム, lavender field

reasoning: Kyushu old townscapes query but get_spots Oita-only returned 宇佐神宮, 別府地獄めぐり, 岡城, 九重町観光協会 (a tourism-association page not a townscape) and missed 杵築 / 日田豆田町 (canonical Oita preservation districts). Query also implied 'coffee towns' (mistranslated Tagalog 'kape') — even semantically off. Schema is good.
missing_entities: 日田豆田町, 杵築, Mameda-machi, 重伝建

reasoning: Hokuriku kominka stay query but get_hotels Ishikawa returned 永井旅館, にしやま旅館 (hisoyu ryokan, semi-relevant), Student housing 1, AB Hotel — none are 古民家. Top of list lacks coordinates/website. No kominka type exists in the schema.
missing_entities: 古民家 stays, satoyama_stay, machiya, 渡辺邸

improvement_hint: Add a kominka/machiya lodging_type via STAY JAPAN or 民泊新法 dataset; filter out student housing from get_hotels.

reasoning: Kii Peninsula mountain shrines query → get_japan_heritage Wakayama. Returns 7 stories incl. 和歌の浦, 西国三十三所 pilgrimage. 紀伊山地の霊場と参詣道 (UNESCO, the canonical mountain-faith story) and 高野山金剛峯寺 / 熊野三山 — partially covered via stories but the response we see leads with 和歌の浦 which is coastal, not mountain. Body_paragraphs are extensive.
missing_entities: 熊野三山, 高野山金剛峯寺, 紀伊山地の霊場 specifically as top entity
improvement_hint: Boost UNESCO 紀伊山地の霊場と参詣道 story when query mentions 山岳信仰/mountain shrine; lead with that over coastal stories.

reasoning: Sea-of-Japan summer fireworks query → get_festivals Niigata. 長岡まつり大花火大会 (canonical Niigata fireworks) appears at #3 with proper dates 2026-08-02/03 and source_url. Other top items (魚沼芝桜まつり, 高城ヒメサユリ祭り) are spring flower festivals, not fireworks. Lacks event_type=fireworks tagging. No language=en translation in items despite lang=en param.
missing_entities: 片貝まつり, 柏崎海の大花火大会, Kashiwazaki fireworks
wrong_facts: description and name fields stayed Japanese despite lang=en parameter
improvement_hint: Add event_subtype tagging (fireworks/sakura/lantern) and apply when 花火/fireworks token detected; fix lang=en branch to translate description fields.

reasoning: Oita bamboo-craft query. METI returns 別府竹細工 (Beppu Bamboo Crafts) — exactly the canonical answer with full English description and source_url. 博多織 also listed because Oita is in production_area_text but is off-topic (textile not bamboo). see_also_wikidata_venues offers museums (大分市美術館 etc.) which is a reasonable agent assist.
missing_entities: 別府竹細工伝統産業会館, 竹工芸 workshop venue
wrong_facts: 博多織 included though not bamboo-related
improvement_hint: Filter MAFF/META designations by industry_category match (here bamboo) when category is too broad; suppress 博多織 when category=bamboo intent.

reasoning: Shikoku cycling query → Ehime get_spots returned 宇和島城, 松山城, 大洲城, 内子座 — all real but not cycling routes. しまなみ海道 (canonical Shikoku cycling route, Onomichi–Imabari, world-famous) absent. No cycling_route kind exists.
missing_entities: しまなみ海道, Shimanami Kaido, とびしま海道, 四国一周サイクリング
improvement_hint: Add cycling_route kind via OSM route=bicycle + national designated cycle routes (ナショナルサイクルルート); surface しまなみ海道 cross-prefecture.

reasoning: Traditional kabuki outside Tokyo/Kyoto query → get_traditional_arts. Top items (Bunraku, Kabuki, Chakkirako, 大日堂舞楽, 早池峰神楽) are art-form designations (UNESCO). The query needed venues — 金丸座 (Kotohira), 内子座, 八千代座 etc. — none surface here as venues. Art-form entries are accurate but venue layer absent.
missing_entities: 金丸座, 旧金毘羅大芝居, 内子座, 八千代座, kabuki venue
